Welcome to the Land of Achievements

Grace and confidence grow through disciplined movement

Rhythmic gymnastics combines strength, flexibility, balance, and musical movement. At Rhythmic Ribbon of Texas, children learn proper technique, body control, and focus in a structured and supportive environment.

Our beginner free trials are designed for families who want a clear, professional introduction to the sport.

Free beginner trials in McKinney and Frisco. Ages 5+. Structured introductions keep first classes calm and organized.

Book a Free Trial Call or text us at 718-689-2469

McKinney

Wed 6:00 to 7:30 PM

Sat 12:45 to 2:15 PM

Frisco

Sat 3:00 to 4:30 PM

Availability is shown based on age and location.

The beauty of rhythmic gymnastics

Rhythmic gymnastics is an Olympic sport that blends athletic training with controlled, expressive movement.

Children develop flexibility, coordination, balance, and strength while learning to move with precision and awareness.

Training also supports focus, discipline, and confidence. These skills benefit children both in athletics and in everyday life.

Skills that carry beyond the gym

  • Improved flexibility, balance, and coordination
  • Stronger body awareness and posture
  • Increased focus and discipline
  • Confidence through structured progress
  • Positive sportsmanship and teamwork

A clear and supportive introduction

Beginner trials are created specifically for first-time athletes.

Classes follow a structured format so athletes can learn fundamentals at an appropriate pace.

Parents can expect clear expectations, organized instruction, and consistent communication throughout the process.

What to expect

A four-step path keeps the process calm and transparent.

  1. Choose a location and trial time - Select the studio and session that works best for your family.
  2. Submit the required waiver - Complete the waiver immediately after requesting a trial to secure the spot.
  3. Receive confirmation details - We email the confirmed time along with arrival instructions and attire guidance.
  4. Attend the scheduled trial class - Arrive a few minutes early so your athlete can get oriented before class begins.

Trials are confirmed after the waiver is completed.

Where we train

Studios in McKinney and Frisco host beginner rhythmic gymnastics trials.

McKinney

4260 Eldorado Pkwy, 2nd Floor

McKinney, TX 75070

Beginner trials: Wed 6:00 PM, Sat 12:45 PM

Frisco

7255 Meadow Hill Dr, Field #5

Frisco, TX 75034

Beginner trials: Sat 3:00 PM

The environment in motion

Images from recent trials, practices, and competitions show how carefully structured sessions balance focus, musicality, and encouragement.

Hands-on fundamentals

Apparatus discovery

Team artistry

Ribbon control

Guided by experienced leadership

Coach Ella leads every trial and training plan.

Coach Ella is the Founder and Head Coach of Rhythmic Ribbon of Texas. She brings decades of experience in rhythmic gymnastics coaching and athlete development.

Coach Ella is a USAG Certified Professional Member and serves in leadership roles within USA Gymnastics in Texas and Region 6. Her approach emphasizes technical accuracy, discipline, and long-term athlete development in a structured environment.

What to wear and bring

Simple attire keeps the focus on movement quality and comfort.

A leotard and white socks are recommended. If a leotard is not available, comfortable athletic clothing is acceptable for the trial.

Please bring water and arrive a few minutes early.

Book a Free Trial

Request a trial time below. You will receive the required waiver form shortly after booking. Once the waiver is completed, your trial will be confirmed and details will be sent by email.
